---
title: "Hassan Pazira"
---

::: {.profile-page}

::: {.profile-text}

## Methodologist and Data Analyst

Hassan supports research projects with statistical modelling, prediction modelling, reproducible reporting, and data preparation. His interests include longitudinal data analysis, clinical prediction models, psychometrics, and machine learning.

Hassan Pazira is a methodologist and data analyst at ARQ. He supports research and clinical projects with statistical modelling, prediction modelling, routine outcome monitoring, reproducible reporting, and data preparation.

His interests include longitudinal data analysis, clinical prediction models, psychometrics, personalized prediction, and machine learning applications in mental health and psychotrauma care.

**E:** h.pazira - at - arq.org

[LinkedIn](#) | [ResearchGate](#)

:::

::: {.profile-photo}

![](../images/people/hassan.jpg)

:::

:::
